name: Franklin Transportation System
districts_or_customers: Houston / Gulf Coast oil & gas crew shuttles
recent_news: BBB and D&B list Franklin Transportation Services LLC (Magnolia/Houston TX) as a limo/shuttle operator in business ~27 years; no school-bus or special-needs student contracts identified (2026).
fit_notes: Not a fit. Houston-area limo/shuttle/charter operator with ~3 employees and no evidence of school-bus or SPED routes; outside Summit's contracted yellow-bus tuck-in profile.

name: Pearsons Town Car Limosne Svc

fit_notes: Not a fit. ~3-employee town car/limo service with no identifiable school district relationships; well below Summit tuck-in threshold and wrong service line.

name: Smiths Limousine Svc

name: Ambu Cab By Neighbors Intl
districts_or_customers: adult/handicapped passengers in Grand Rapids area
recent_news: Listed as a handicapped/wheelchair transport service at 541 Clancy Ave NE, Grand Rapids; distinct from AMR/Life EMS's 'Amb-U-Cab'. No school-district contracts identified (2026).
fit_notes: Not a fit. Appears to be a 4-person NEMT/handicapped-transport micro-operator, not a yellow-bus or contracted SPED student-transport provider; sub-scale for Summit.
